data.title: Lexaria Launches 2026 R&D Push to Advance GLP-1 and Cannabidiol Drug Delivery
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Lexaria Bioscience ( (LEXX) ) is now available.

Lexaria has outlined its 2026 research and development program, centering on new human and animal studies intended to expand pharmaceutical applications and intellectual property around its DehydraTECH drug delivery platform. Management emphasized that the program is designed to generate practical results that increase the likelihood of industry partnerships and new patentable formulations, particularly in the GLP-1 and cannabidiol therapeutic categories.

The flagship human trial, GLP-1-H26-7, will compare SNAC-inclusive DehydraTECH-semaglutide capsules and tablets with commercially available Wegovy tablets over a five-week period, with a larger sample size aimed at producing statistically robust pharmacokinetic and safety data by late 2026. In parallel, two animal studies, including GLP-1-A26-1 with multiple dosing arms and brain biodistribution assessments, will test a range of GLP-1 and cannabidiol formulations to support new IP generation and refine candidates for future human trials, potentially strengthening Lexaria’s position in next-generation metabolic and neurological treatments.

The most recent analyst rating on (LEXX) stock is a Buy with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lexaria Bioscience stock, see the LEXX Stock Forecast page.

More about Lexaria Bioscience

Lexaria Bioscience Corp. is a drug delivery technology company that develops and commercializes its DehydraTECH platform to enhance the absorption and effectiveness of active pharmaceutical ingredients. The company focuses on applications in GLP-1 therapies, cannabidiol-based therapeutics, and other pharma partnerships, targeting improved formulations that can attract licensing and co-development deals.

Average Trading Volume: 643,774

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $16.8M

data.title: Melrose Chair Chris Grigg Increases Stake with £96,000 Share Purchase
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Melrose ( (GB:MRO) ) has issued an update.

Melrose Industries PLC disclosed that its non-executive chair, Chris Grigg, and his wife Fionna jointly purchased 17,901 ordinary shares in the company on 4 March 2026 at 539.52 pence per share. The transaction lifts their combined holding to 63,637 shares, equivalent to about 0.005% of Melrose’s issued share capital, signaling a modest vote of confidence in the business from its chair.

The share purchase, executed on the London Stock Exchange and valued at roughly £96,579, was reported in line with market abuse regulations governing dealings by senior insiders. While small in percentage terms, such director dealings are often watched by investors as an indicator of management’s assessment of the company’s prospects and valuation.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:MRO) stock is a Buy with a £631.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Melrose stock, see the GB:MRO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:MRO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:MRO is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving fundamentals and upbeat, quantified 2026 guidance (growth, margin expansion, and higher free cash flow), partially offset by weak/volatile cash conversion and higher leverage. Technicals are a notable drag due to the stock trading below major moving averages, while valuation is broadly neutral with only modest dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:MRO stock, click here.

More about Melrose

Melrose Industries PLC is a UK-based industrial group that typically focuses on acquiring and improving engineering and manufacturing businesses before exiting them at enhanced value. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange and its ordinary shares trade in pounds sterling, attracting institutional and retail investors interested in industrial turnarounds.

data.title: Jinxin Fertility Boosts Capacity in Shenzhen and Sees U.S. IVF Demand Surge
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jinxin Fertility Group Ltd. ( (HK:1951) ) has shared an announcement.

Jinxin Fertility Group has launched trial operations at the new campus of Shenzhen Zhongshan Obstetrics and Gynecology Hospital, a centrally located facility four times larger than its original site, enabling expansion into VIP, specialty and international medical services. The Shenzhen operations recorded an 18% rise in oocyte pick-up cycles in the first two months of 2026 versus a year earlier, underscoring robust volume growth from the enlarged capacity.

In the U.S., HRC Fertility clinics under Jinxin’s management reported a 38% increase in oocyte pick-up cycles over the same period, driven by higher local demand after California’s IVF insurance mandate for large employers took effect in January 2026. The company said it will continue to optimize operations, upgrade core reproductive technologies and enhance patient care to support sustainable long-term growth and strengthen its position in the global fertility services market.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1951) stock is a Hold with a HK$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jinxin Fertility Group Ltd. stock, see the HK:1951 Stock Forecast page.

More about Jinxin Fertility Group Ltd.

Jinxin Fertility Group Limited operates in the reproductive medicine and fertility services industry, providing assisted reproductive treatments and obstetrics and gynecology care through hospitals and clinics in China and the United States. The group focuses on advanced reproductive technologies, VIP and specialized medical services, and international patient offerings, positioning itself to capture growing demand for fertility solutions in key urban and overseas markets.

data.title: ReTo Eco-Solutions Buys 51% of Seven Arrows to Push Smart Craft Beer Expansion in China
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from ReTo Eco-Solutions ( (RETO) ) is now available.

On February 27, 2026, ReTo Eco-Solutions, Inc. closed a share exchange to acquire 51% of Seven Arrows Supply Chain Limited, a British Virgin Islands company whose Hainan-based subsidiary manages and distributes craft beer in China, for 8,670,000 newly issued Class A shares valued at $8.67 million. Announced on March 4, 2026, the deal is intended to expand ReTo’s presence in intelligent beer vending equipment by using Seven Arrows’ offline distribution network to deploy smart craft beer vending machines across Chinese cities, aiming to build an integrated beer ecosystem, boost cash flow, and create procurement, logistics and channel synergies for shareholders and other stakeholders.

ReTo said the transaction aligns with its strategy to emphasize high-growth, cash-generating businesses, with Seven Arrows’ supply chain capabilities expected to complement the company’s smart vending operations. The acquisition also significantly increases ReTo’s outstanding Class A share count to 11,013,201, signaling a notable equity-funded diversification from eco-friendly construction materials into beverage-related technology and distribution, which may reshape its operational focus and market positioning in China’s consumer and retail-tech segments.

The most recent analyst rating on (RETO) stock is a Hold with a $0.95 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ReTo Eco-Solutions stock, see the RETO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RETO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RETO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily weighed down by weak financial performance (ongoing losses and declining revenue) and bearish technical signals (price below all key moving averages with negative MACD). Improved operating cash flow and reduced leverage provide some support, while valuation inputs are unavailable and therefore do not materially influence the score.

To see Spark’s full report on RETO stock, click here.

More about ReTo Eco-Solutions

ReTo Eco-Solutions, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as RETO, focuses on research, development, manufacturing and sales of eco-friendly construction materials made from mining waste and fly ash, environmental protection equipment and intelligent equipment. The Beijing-based company also offers consultation, design, implementation, installation, engineering support and technical services, primarily serving infrastructure and environmental markets in China.

data.title: Azenta Acquires UK Biocentre to Expand European Biorepository
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Azenta ( (AZTA) ).

On March 4, 2026, Azenta announced that its subsidiary Azenta UK Ltd had completed the acquisition of UK Biocentre Limited, a UK-based provider of sample management, storage and high-throughput processing services, for total consideration of GBP 20.5 million, including up to GBP 1.8 million in contingent payments. Founded in 2014, UK Biocentre generated about GBP 15.3 million in revenue in the 12 months to September 30, 2025 and will continue operating under its existing name.

The deal is designed to expand Azenta’s biorepository and sample management footprint in Europe by using UK Biocentre as a regional operational hub complementing its Griesheim, Germany facility and serving pharmaceutical, biotech, academic and public health clients. Azenta expects the transaction to be modestly dilutive to its 2026 adjusted EBITDA margin by about 35 basis points but accretive to organic revenue growth and margin expansion in 2027 and 2028, while enhancing its ability to deliver large-scale, automated biorepository capabilities such as the 16-million-sample BioArc Ultra platform and reinforcing its positioning at the center of key life sciences workflows.

The most recent analyst rating on (AZTA) stock is a Buy with a $32.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Azenta stock, see the AZTA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AZTA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AZTA is a Neutral.

AZTA’s score is driven primarily by solid financial stability (low leverage and currently positive cash flow) and reaffirmed guidance supporting a margin-improvement narrative. These positives are weighed down by a very weak technical setup (stock below all major moving averages with bearish momentum) and ongoing profitability challenges, with near-term margin pressure highlighted on the earnings call.

To see Spark’s full report on AZTA stock, click here.

More about Azenta

Azenta, Inc., headquartered in Burlington, Mass., is a leading global provider of life sciences solutions, offering cold-chain sample management and multiomics services that support drug development, clinical research and advanced cell therapies. The company serves major pharmaceutical, biotechnology, academic and healthcare institutions worldwide through brands including GENEWIZ, FluidX, Ziath, 4titude, Limfinity, Freezer Pro and Barkey.

Azenta operates across North America, Europe and Asia, focusing on enabling customers to bring new therapies and scientific breakthroughs to market more quickly. Its portfolio spans end-to-end sample lifecycle management and genomic services, positioning the company as a key infrastructure and technology partner in the life sciences ecosystem.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.13B

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

GS Chain Plc ( (GB:GSC) ) has shared an update.

GS Chain Plc reported that all resolutions at its latest annual general meeting were passed, including approval of the annual report and directors’ remuneration for the year ended 30 June 2025. Shareholders also supported the re-election of directors Leon Filipovic, Sebastien Guerin and Mark Wilson, as well as the reappointment of Macalvins Limited as auditor.

Investors endorsed measures giving the board authority to allot new securities and to disapply pre-emption rights, alongside adopting new articles of association. The strong backing, with most resolutions receiving over 97% support, reinforces the current governance structure and provides the company with flexibility to raise equity capital and adjust its corporate framework to support future strategic initiatives.

More about GS Chain Plc

GS Chain Plc, listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker GSC, operates as an investment vehicle seeking acquisition and growth opportunities, typically in technology and related high-growth sectors. The company’s strategy focuses on identifying targets where it can deploy capital and corporate governance to create shareholder value in the UK market and potentially beyond.

data.title: Tevogen Bio Announces 1-for-50 Reverse Stock Split
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tevogen Bio Holdings ( (TVGN) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 3, 2026, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. filed a Certificate of Amendment in Delaware to implement a 1-for-50 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective March 6, 2026, following shareholder approval on February 19, 2026. The move will reduce the roughly 202.4 million outstanding shares proportionally without changing authorized share count or relative ownership stakes, aside from minor adjustments due to cash in lieu of fractional shares.

Tevogen’s board approved the split to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq’s $1.00 minimum bid price requirement, with trading to begin on a split-adjusted basis under the unchanged TVGN ticker and a new CUSIP. All equity awards, warrants, and convertible preferred stock will be adjusted to reflect the new share ratio, leaving the company’s underlying operations and total stockholders’ equity unchanged but potentially stabilizing its listing status and market perception.

The most recent analyst rating on (TVGN) stock is a Sell with a $0.26 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tevogen Bio Holdings stock, see the TVGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TVGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TVGN is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, negative free cash flow, and negative equity), which outweighs the benefit of lower debt. Technicals add further pressure with a strong downtrend and negative MACD, while valuation metrics offer limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TVGN stock, click here.

More about Tevogen Bio Holdings

Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc. is a socially integrated healthcare enterprise focused on affordability, efficiency, and scientific rigor in advanced therapeutics. The company leverages artificial intelligence and precision T cell therapy platforms through its Tevogen Bio and Tevogen.AI initiatives to develop treatments in virology, oncology, neurology, and scalable solutions for the broader healthcare system.

Tevogen Bio has completed a proof-of-concept clinical trial for its single-HLA-restricted, genetically unmodified allogeneic T cells, built on its proprietary ExacTcell platform. Tevogen.AI aims to accelerate drug development and target detection using predictive technologies and cloud-based data services, while the company also explores future strategic moves in generics, biosimilars, medical devices, and innovative insurance solutions to expand patient access.

Average Trading Volume: 946,067

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $49.92M

data.description:

Carnival ( (GB:CCL) ) just unveiled an update.

Carnival plc has confirmed that, as of 28 February 2026, it had 217,413,915 issued ordinary shares, of which 28,398,278 are held in treasury and 42,876,272 held by Carnival Corporation do not carry voting rights. This results in 146,139,365 voting rights attached to 189,015,637 issued and outstanding ordinary shares, a figure shareholders must now use as the denominator when assessing disclosure obligations under FCA transparency rules.

The clarified voting rights position provides investors and other stakeholders with an updated reference point for monitoring significant shareholdings in Carnival plc. By formally disclosing the current capital and voting structure, the company supports regulatory compliance and enhances transparency in its ownership profile, which can influence how institutional investors track and report changes in their stakes.

Valuation is neutral-to-slightly supportive due to a reasonable P/E, tempered by a low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CCL stock, click here.

UBTECH ROBOTICS CORP LTD Class H ( (HK:9880) ) just unveiled an announcement.

UBTECH Robotics Corp Ltd, a Hong Kong-listed Chinese robotics company, operates through subsidiaries including Wuxi Uqi to deliver project engineering services and robotics-related products to industrial customers, and actively manages its capital structure via bank credit arrangements. The company is updating its Articles of Association to reflect changes in share capital following a recent placing, aligning its governance with its expanded equity base.

The company’s subsidiary Wuxi Uqi has signed a new framework agreement with shareholder MAE Group to supply project engineering products and services through the end of 2028, classified as a continuing connected transaction but deemed on normal commercial terms and in shareholders’ interests by the board. UBTECH’s board has also approved an application for new bank credit, subject to shareholder approval, to ensure continuity of financing for business expansion, while proposed amendments to the Articles of Association will be put to an extraordinary general meeting to formalize the increased share capital.

data.title: Tivic Health Appoints New CEO to Drive Biopharma Pivot
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tivic Health Systems ( (TIVC) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 4, 2026, Tivic Health Systems announced that biotech veteran Michael K. Handley had been appointed chief executive officer and director, succeeding founding CEO Jennifer Ernst, who will continue to support the company during the transition. The leadership change is intended to accelerate Tivic’s pivot toward high-growth biopharma opportunities, leveraging Handley’s track record in commercializing late-stage therapies and the company’s Velocity Bioworks unit to advance its immunotherapy pipeline and sharpen its competitive positioning.

Handley’s arrival signals a more aggressive push into late-stage immunotherapies, including the development of Tivic’s lead drug Entolimod and related assets such as Entolasta. For investors and partners, the move underscores Tivic’s ambition to scale its biopharma footprint by combining experienced leadership with integrated contract biomanufacturing capabilities that are expected to support faster development, lower costs and greater supply chain control.

The most recent analyst rating on (TIVC) stock is a Hold with a $0.98 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tivic Health Systems stock, see the TIVC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TIVC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TIVC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (minimal revenue, persistent losses, and significant cash burn). Technicals also remain bearish with the stock below major moving averages and negative MACD. Strategic progress and improved cash on the earnings update provide partial support, but financing-related leverage/dilution risk and a negative earnings-based valuation keep the overall score low.

To see Spark’s full report on TIVC stock, click here.

More about Tivic Health Systems

Tivic Health Systems, Inc. is a late-stage immunotherapeutics company focused on developing immune-modulating drugs for conditions such as Acute Radiation Syndrome and neutropenia. Its lead candidate, Entolimod, a TLR5 agonist targeting radiation- and age-related cell damage, anchors a pipeline that also includes Entolasta for chronic applications, supported by in-house biomanufacturing via its CDMO subsidiary Velocity Bioworks.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.01M
